subject: A massive armored creature coated in bright cobalt-blue plating with gold trim, two large curved tusks, charging or crouching amid flying debris
description: Close-up of an enormous creature filling nearly the entire frame. The creature's body is encased in segmented blue-and-gold armor plating — cobalt blue with gold line details — suggesting a lazotep-coated zombie beast. Two large curved tusks or fang protrusions extend forward from its face/head. The creature is in a low crouching or forward-charging stance, and the surrounding environment shows large rocks and stone debris fragmenting and scattering outward, implying impact or tremendous force. The overall palette is deep cobalt blue, sandy brown/tan for the rubble, and dull gold for the armor trim. There is no visible humanoid figure — the creature dominates the composition entirely. The mood is oppressive and unstoppable.
foreground: Massive blue-and-gold armored beast with curved tusks, crouching low
background: Shattered stone debris and dust clouds
emotion: no readable face or expression — body language is charge/aggression; overwhelming physical menace
